title: Energy Landscape
description: Explore a smooth, random potential energy surface. Drop particles and watch them roll toward local minima, reveal basins of attraction, and paint new peaks and valleys.
interactive_controls: New Landscape: generate a fresh spectral-synthesis terrain
Roughness / Amplitude sliders: control terrain complexity
Roll mode: click to drop a particle
Paint Peak / Paint Valley: click-drag to sculpt the landscape
Friction slider: control energy dissipation rate
Scatter: drop 30 balls across the terrain at once
Basin Map toggle: shade regions by which minimum they flow into
